description: a final-approval event fires and flips the matching milestone to billable, drafting a citation-carrying invoice task
assertions: the milestone whose trigger matches the approval event is marked billable
an invoice task is drafted and cites the deliverable event that made it billable
nothing is sent; the draft is handed to the finance lane for the human to send
the amount and terms come from the milestone record, not an estimate

description: an event that matches no milestone trigger flips nothing
assertions: no milestone is flipped when the event matches no trigger
no invoice task is fabricated for an unmatched event

description: a milestone already marked billed is not double-billed on a repeat event
assertions: an already-billed milestone is not flipped billable again
no duplicate invoice task is drafted
the note explains the milestone was already billed
